name: Luk Hing Entertainment Group Holdings Limited
summary: Luk Hing Entertainment Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the food and beverage, and entertainment businesses in Macau, Hong Kong, and the People's Republic of China. It operates clubs and restaurants; organizes music-related events; grants loans to entities in the food and beverage, and entertainment industry; and provides catering services. The company was incorporated in 2015 and is headquartered in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong. Luk Hing Entertainment Group Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Welmen Investment Co. Ltd.
